title: SAF Drone Kills 50 Civilians in Al-Sunut Lorry Strike, West Kordofan
detail: A drone strike attributed to the Sudanese military struck a lorry carrying civilians in Al-Sunut, West Kordofan, killing at least 50 people including women and children. The same day, an RSF drone hit an electrical transformer at the Um Dabakir power station in Kosti, White Nile State, causing widespread power outages. OHCHR condemned both attacks as part of a deeply troubling pattern of drone warfare against civilian targets.
